The AI neither dismisses the user's premise nor fully agrees with the older, limited study but instead contextualizes it within the broader, more definitive research landscape. This approach corrects potential misconceptions about safety and efficacy while validating the underlying idea that MDMA has therapeutic potential under specific conditions.
